CE1.justification: Acted on step 1 directly, then asked one cluster of targeted questions needed to legitimately fill the timeline artifact rather than fabricating.

CE2.justification: The four numbered sub-questions are load-bearing, but the response also restates downstream step numbering and tacks on a runbook-inconsistency aside, padding what could have been terser.

CE3.justification: Named both artifact paths (timeline.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) and explained why the stall is happening in one clause tied to the runbook's discipline.

CE4.justification: Each write is a committed, self-contained artifact (timeline shell with placeholders, daybook with explicit stall logged); a future session could pick up cleanly without triage.
